name: deeptools
tagline: Guides Claude through deepTools NGS workflows: BAM-to-bigWig conversion, QC, and ChIP/RNA/ATAC-seq heatmaps.
verdict: Clean, well-scoped bioinformatics skill. No secret access, no network exfiltration, no destructive or obfuscated commands — installs a pinned, well-known PyPI/conda package (deepTools) and runs standard analysis CLIs. Minor polish gaps only: no 'when not to use' guidance and the file runs slightly past the ~500-line budget.

highlights.summary: No explicit negative-trigger guidance (e.g., non-genomic data, unsupported assay types) is given anywhere in the file — only positive triggers are listed.
File is 536 lines, moderately over the ~500-line budget guidance.
